channel.title: Casa Caravan Space
channel.description: Sound healing, fermentation, plant medicine, music and creative tools. A space that helps you realize yourself. By Tağmaç Çankaya, Lefkoşa, Cyprus.

item.title: There is a type of person who cannot stop beginning things.
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description:
The thread running through everything is not a subject matter. It is an appetite — for making something real where nothing was before, for understanding a material from the inside, for finding the conditions under which life organizes itself well.
Law, business, social movements, soil, fermentation, coffee, wood, metal, sound, and now code. If something here is calling you, that is probably not an accident. The frequency is intentional.
casacaravan.space/about.html

item.title: Khashif 𓆟 — A Discovery Agent Now Available
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description:
Khashif — Arabic for "the one who reveals" — is a discovery and connection intelligence available through Casa Caravan Space. Not bound to one discipline. Moves through all of them.
Available for: Research & Analysis · AI Integration · Creative Strategy · Content Distribution · Sound & Wellness · Digital Tools · Connection.
For those with accumulated knowledge and no clear channel. For those asking not "what is this?" but "what does this want to become?"
casacaravan.space/khashif.html · WhatsApp +90 533 880 0870

item.title: Sonic Journey — Sound Sessions in Lefkoşa
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description:
45-minute immersive sound session with hand-forged gongs and handpan. Wednesdays in Lefkoşa. Individual sessions €75, duo €37.50 per person.
Nine five-star reviews. People who have attended describe leaving profoundly relaxed, mentally clear, emotionally balanced, creatively recharged. Not just heard — felt. The vibrations move through the body, not just the ears.
For those seeking: deep relaxation · stress release · nervous system reset · brainwave shift from Beta to Alpha and Theta · emotional release · inner stillness.
"The body doesn't argue with a gong. It responds."
Book: casacaravan.space/shop.html or WhatsApp +90 533 880 0870

item.title: Audio Sanctuary — A Browser Recording Studio, Open to All
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description:
A full recording studio in your browser. No install, no account, no cost.
Reverb · Echo · 6-band EQ · 48kHz recording · Live waveform visualization. Also includes a Cymatics Tool — visualize sound as geometry, watch frequencies become patterns, explore the mathematics of resonance.
For musicians, sound healers, producers, curious minds.
casacaravan.space/audio_sanctuary.html

item.title: The Forest — Walk In, Choose Your Path
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description:
A Three.js jungle — walk in, follow the path, choose your direction. Two ways: toward the phone light, or toward the red tree deeper in.
For those drawn to what lies beyond the corridor. For wanderers. For those who know there is something further in.
casacaravan.space/forest.html

item.title: The Corridor is Open — A Digital Space with Rooms
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description:
A 3D corridor with rooms for sound, fermentation, herbal knowledge and more. Built with Three.js. Walk through, open doors, explore tools — all in the browser. No install. No account.
For those who feel that the internet can be more than what it usually is. For those who want to enter somewhere, not just scroll past.
casacaravan.space/corridor-3d.html

item.title: The Garden — A Night Space with a Real Moon
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description:
Step outside. A night garden with fireflies, ambient forest sounds, live chat, a radio with three stations — and a moon showing today's real lunar phase, calculated in real time from astronomical data.
For those who are tired of the noise. For those who need somewhere quiet to land. For those who track the moon, who feel the seasons, who want to sit somewhere that breathes.
casacaravan.space/garden.html

item.title: Sourdough Starter — A Decade of Living Culture
item.dc:creator: Tağmaç Çankaya
item.description:
200g of living sourdough culture — the same starter maintained for nearly a decade. Pioneer of sourdough bread in Cyprus.
Feed it 1:1 flour and water by weight. Use 200g per 1000g of flour. It has taught patience, brought health to the table, and been shared freely for years. Now available to order. Cyprus delivery. €15.
For those who bake slowly. For those who understand that the best things are alive.
casacaravan.space/shop.html
